title: haplopappus chryseus
intro: Haplopappus chryseus, also known as the Golden Groundsel, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally used in herbal medicine, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Haplopappus chryseus include its ability to reduce fever, ease respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to address various health concerns.
